tagline: Lean prompts, strong heuristics — Fable 5 degrades on bloat.
effort_line: Give the full spec up front in one turn and run at xhigh effort. Keep this prompt lean — over-prescription degrades Fable 5.
idioms: State the goal up front and keep instructions minimal-but-strong.
Lean on memory and context, not a wall of rules.
notes: Mythos-tier frontier model. Prompt it minimal-with-strong-heuristics: a sharp goal, a short set of strong principles, and room to reason. Give the whole spec in one turn, run at xhigh effort, and lean on memory/compaction rather than exhaustive rules — mega-prompts measurably degrade it.
